channel.title: Projects on Serge Bibauw
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Serge Bibauw

item.title: Reflexive writing at the high-school to university transition
item.description: FNRS-FRFC research project from 2008 to 2010 (Université catholique de Louvain). Supervised by Jean-Louis Dufays and Francine Thyrion. Researchers: Serge Bibauw Marc Slingeneyer.

item.title: Task-based dialogue systems for language learning
item.description: Doctoral research project at KU Leuven and Université catholique de Louvain. Funded by a SENESCYT scholarship (Ecuador). Researcher: Serge Bibauw. Supervisors: Piet Desmet (KU Leuven) and Thomas François (Université catholique de Louvain)
